# Gemini Spark Task Board

Gemini Spark Task Board is a SaaS workspace for Gemini Spark task approval board.

Website: https://geminisparktaskboard.space/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: Gemini Spark task approval board
Type: SaaS
Default plan: team

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
